versions.installHtml:
helm upgrade --install istio-base oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=istio-base:1.28.3" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install istio-cni oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=istio-cni:1.29.2" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install istiod oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=istiod:1.28.3" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install istio-ztunnel oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=istio-ztunnel:1.29.2" \
  -n kcm-system
versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   istio-base-1-28-3               true
# kcm-system   istio-cni-1-29-2                true
# kcm-system   istiod-1-28-3                   true
# kcm-system   istio-ztunnel-1-29-2            true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: istio-ambient
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: istio-base-1-28-3
      name: istio-base
      namespace: istio-system
    - template: istio-cni-1-29-2
      name: istio-cni
      namespace: istio-system
      values: |
        cni:
          profile: ambient
    - template: istiod-1-28-3
      name: istiod
      namespace: istio-system
      values: |
        istiod:
          profile: ambient
    - template: istio-ztunnel-1-29-2
      name: istio-ztunnel
      namespace: istio-system
